jokes.text: Celebrity Ape Fight will return next week at its regular time.
jokes.setup: Network announcer delivering standard sports broadcast transition
jokes.punchline: The show being transitioned to is 'Celebrity Ape Fight' - absurdly specific and ridiculous
jokes.explanation: Classic Futurama worldbuilding humor - takes familiar sports broadcast format and adds absurd future element

jokes.text: Who should I root for? America? Or a country I learned about at the food court?
jokes.setup: Character wondering which country to support at Olympics
jokes.punchline: His geographical knowledge comes from food court exposure
jokes.explanation: Perfect Fry characterization - his ignorance is both innocent and absurdly specific

jokes.text: No. They're from the Republic of French Stereotypes. Everybody hates them.
jokes.setup: Fry asking about which team to root for
jokes.punchline: Country literally named after stereotypes, with matter-of-fact hatred
jokes.explanation: Brilliant meta-joke about stereotyping while creating an absurd nation name

jokes.text: All this inspiring multiculturalism is angrying up my blood!
jokes.setup: Olympics presenting inspiring international unity
jokes.punchline: Hermes reacts with anger to 'inspiring' multiculturalism, plus made-up verb 'angrying'
jokes.explanation: Good character moment - Hermes' bureaucratic nature conflicts with Olympic spirit

jokes.text: Go on, stick, touch me. Can't do it.
jokes.setup: Hermes claiming he's still limbo-capable
jokes.punchline: Limbo stick can't even reach his now-larger body
jokes.explanation: Visual gag showing physical comedy of Hermes' denial about his fitness

jokes.text: Quit lying to your pudgy self.
jokes.setup: Hermes in denial about his limbo abilities
jokes.punchline: Wife's blunt assessment with 'pudgy self'
jokes.explanation: LaBarbara's characteristic directness - good character consistency

jokes.text: Yeah. Isn't that basically all Jamaicans do?
jokes.setup: Discussion of Jamaica's limbo team
jokes.punchline: Fry's innocent but offensive stereotyping
jokes.explanation: Typical Fry ignorance creating cringe moment - character-appropriate but not particularly clever

jokes.text: Which is why the limbo team got detained at the airport.
jokes.setup: Hermes defending that Jamaicans have other interests
jokes.punchline: Immediately undercuts his defense by implying drug-related detention
jokes.explanation: Sharp comedic structure - sets up defense then immediately undermines it with dark implication

jokes.text: I described it to them on the phone using a series of artful euphemisms.
jokes.setup: Question about whether Olympic officials saw his current physique
jokes.punchline: Hermes diplomatically described his fat body with 'artful euphemisms'
jokes.explanation: Perfect Hermes - his bureaucratic nature extends to delicate personal descriptions

jokes.text: Don't worry. The fat pig will do fine...
jokes.setup: Professor offering encouragement to Hermes
jokes.punchline: Calls him 'fat pig' while trying to be supportive
jokes.explanation: Classic Professor tactlessness - trying to help but insulting instead

jokes.text: Those haven't descended in years!
jokes.setup: Hermes putting on body-reshaping suit
jokes.punchline: Refers to body parts being repositioned after years
jokes.explanation: Body humor with uncomfortable anatomical implications - gets laugh through surprise

jokes.text: Look at that fine Jamaican bacon!
jokes.setup: Hermes looking fit in his body suit
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg's inappropriate food-related compliment
jokes.explanation: Perfect Zoidberg - reduces human body to food terms, completely inappropriate

jokes.text: Something tells me I could easily beat those trained professionals.
jokes.setup: Watching Olympic-level robot benders compete
jokes.punchline: Bender's delusional confidence he could beat world-class athletes
jokes.explanation: Pure Bender arrogance - perfect character consistency in his overconfidence

jokes.text: My dreams of glory died before they began. Welcome to my life.
jokes.setup: Bender seeing how good the competition is
jokes.punchline: Bender's dramatic despair followed by Leela's dry 'Welcome to my life'
jokes.explanation: Good contrast between Bender's drama and Leela's resigned realism

jokes.text: Hermes Conrad, is that you inside that dumpy little fat man?
jokes.setup: Recognizing Hermes at the Olympics
jokes.punchline: Describes Hermes as contained within a 'dumpy little fat man'
jokes.explanation: Good insult structure - treats current Hermes as separate from his former self

jokes.text: Your body may be as perfectly sculpted as it was 20 years ago... When you whupped my fat ass every time.
jokes.setup: Hermes acknowledging Barbados Slim's continued fitness
jokes.punchline: Admits to historical defeats while calling his own ass fat
jokes.explanation: Self-deprecating humor showing Hermes' acceptance of his limitations

jokes.text: I see you're still able to limbo under the bar of fashion sense.
jokes.setup: Limbo competition context
jokes.punchline: Applies limbo metaphor to insult about fashion sense
jokes.explanation: Excellent wordplay connecting limbo sport to metaphorical 'bar' of standards

jokes.text: That's it, Barbados Slim! You've gone one toke over the line!
jokes.setup: Hermes getting angry at insult
jokes.punchline: References drug song while maintaining Jamaican character connection
jokes.explanation: Cultural reference that fits character while being an escalation threat

jokes.text: God, I hope he wins.
jokes.setup: Race between her husband Hermes and his rival
jokes.punchline: Wife openly rooting for her husband's opponent
jokes.explanation: Brutal marital disloyalty delivered with perfect economy - cuts deep

jokes.text: He's limboed out of retirement and straight into my heart.
jokes.setup: Commentating on Hermes' performance
jokes.punchline: Uses limbo terminology for romantic confession about opponent
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay while showing wife's continued attraction to Slim

jokes.text: I say, 'Go to hell, Barbados Slim!'
jokes.setup: Just expressed hope that Barbados Slim wins and attraction to him
jokes.punchline: Immediately follows with opposite sentiment for appearances
jokes.explanation: Shows character's attempt to cover for her obvious disloyalty

jokes.text: Come on, Hermes! Beat that mahogany god!
jokes.setup: Cheering for Hermes in limbo competition
jokes.punchline: Describes opponent as 'mahogany god' while trying to support Hermes
jokes.explanation: 'Mahogany god' is a beautiful description that undermines the support it's meant to provide

jokes.text: If I'd wanted a human adonis for a husband... I'd have stayed married to Barbados Slim.
jokes.setup: Comforting Hermes after his loss
jokes.punchline: Reveals she was actually previously married to his rival
jokes.explanation: Perfect joke construction - what seems like comfort becomes devastating revelation

jokes.text: I wish everybody else was dead.
jokes.setup: Bender feeling embarrassed about losing at bending
jokes.punchline: Wishes for mass death instead of self-improvement
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender - would rather everyone die than face his own inadequacy

jokes.text: Methinks a clever man-Bot, suitably disguised... Might win those events.
jokes.setup: Seeing fem-bot bending competition announced
jokes.punchline: Bender immediately considering cheating by cross-dressing
jokes.explanation: Sets up main plot while showing Bender's opportunistic cheating nature

jokes.text: My name is Coilette, and I'm from Robonia.
jokes.setup: Bender attempting to register as female competitor
jokes.punchline: Made-up feminine name and obviously fake country
jokes.explanation: 'Robonia' is perfectly absurd - sounds made up but has just enough plausibility

jokes.text: But 'Robonia' sounds like something somebody made up on the spot.
jokes.setup: Bender claiming to be from Robonia
jokes.punchline: Official immediately calls out the obvious fakeness
jokes.explanation: Meta-joke acknowledging the obvious fakeness the audience just noticed

jokes.text: Ever been beaten up by a guy dressed like a chick? Yeah.
jokes.setup: Bender threatening official who questions his registration
jokes.punchline: Official casually admits this has happened to him before
jokes.explanation: Dark humor in official's matter-of-fact admission to specific type of assault

jokes.text: I'm great! Everybody else sucks! Except that guy Bender. He's really something.
jokes.setup: Coilette winning multiple gold medals
jokes.punchline: Praises himself in third person while in disguise
jokes.explanation: Classic Bender ego - even in disguise he can't help praising his real self

jokes.text: You actually thought they'd let you walk away without an engine-Oil sex check?
jokes.setup: Bender surprised by gender testing requirement
jokes.punchline: Robot-specific version of Olympic gender testing with 'engine-oil sex check'
jokes.explanation: Good sci-fi adaptation of real Olympic controversy - 'engine-oil' is perfect robot biology

jokes.text: Professor, make a woman out of me! Oh, I think we should just stay friends.
jokes.setup: Bender desperately asking Professor for help
jokes.punchline: Professor misinterprets as sexual advance
jokes.explanation: Perfect misdirection - takes literal request and finds sexual interpretation

jokes.text: Replacing your testoster-Oil with fem-Bot lubricants... Can cause wild mood swings.
jokes.setup: Explaining robot sex change procedure
jokes.punchline: Robot hormones as automotive fluids
jokes.explanation: Clever robot biology wordplay that sets up character development

jokes.text: Pfft.
jokes.setup: Leela mentioning respect for dignity of women
jokes.punchline: Bender's dismissive pfft sound
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender response - dismisses women's dignity with minimal effort

jokes.text: But for the proud people of Robonia!
jokes.setup: Professor explaining why he must do the operation
jokes.punchline: References the obviously made-up country as if it's real
jokes.explanation: Good callback that shows Professor buying into the fake nationalism

jokes.text: I can't watch this 'cause it's creepy and wrong and sick. However, I will watch out of curiosity.
jokes.setup: Amy expressing moral objection to the operation
jokes.punchline: Immediately contradicts herself by admitting she'll watch anyway
jokes.explanation: Relatable human contradiction between moral stance and curiosity

jokes.text: I have to get home to watch The Zombie Osbournes.
jokes.setup: Official explaining why they can't wait longer
jokes.punchline: Future TV show combining zombies with The Osbournes reality show
jokes.explanation: Good future pop culture parody - logical evolution of reality TV excess

jokes.text: Hail, hail Robonia... A land I didn't make up...
jokes.setup: Bender singing patriotic song for his fake country
jokes.punchline: Lyrics specifically deny the country is made up
jokes.explanation: Excellent meta-humor - anthem lyrics that protest too much about authenticity

jokes.text: You're making us look like jerks in front of the other genders!
jokes.setup: Leela criticizing Bender's female behavior
jokes.punchline: References 'other genders' implying future has many more than two
jokes.explanation: Clever worldbuilding detail suggesting expanded future gender categories

jokes.text: Dear Lord, a coaster!
jokes.setup: Discussion about Bender's feminine changes
jokes.punchline: Bender suddenly obsessed with protecting furniture
jokes.explanation: Funny feminine stereotype - sudden domestic concern from previously crude robot

jokes.text: The Femmzoil must be sashaying girlishly into your processor.
jokes.setup: Explaining Bender's behavior change
jokes.punchline: Oil 'sashaying' like a feminine walk
jokes.explanation: Brilliant wordplay combining mechanical and behavioral descriptions

jokes.text: My breasts are keeping me awake at night anyway.
jokes.setup: Bender wanting to change back
jokes.punchline: Practical complaint about robot anatomy modifications
jokes.explanation: Mundane complaint about extraordinary situation - relatable body discomfort

jokes.text: No, I don't have my own limo. You'd better send one.
jokes.setup: Bender accepting TV appearance
jokes.punchline: Immediately makes celebrity demands despite being fake
jokes.explanation: Shows Bender's instant adaptation to celebrity lifestyle and demands

jokes.text: Funny story. The script called for me to say 'yes.' But I gave it a little twist.
jokes.setup: Calculon explaining his dramatic 'No!' performance
jokes.punchline: Describes saying opposite word as creative interpretation
jokes.explanation: Perfect Calculon - treats minimal script change as profound artistic choice

jokes.text: Anecdote accepted. Snappy comeback not found.
jokes.setup: Talk show host responding to Calculon's story
jokes.punchline: Robot admits computational failure to generate humor
jokes.explanation: Brilliant robot humor - admits to processing failure in generating wit

jokes.text: If you ask me, women today are too stuck-up... To go out and jiggle their Jell-O like everybody wants them to.
jokes.setup: Asked for advice for young fem-bots
jokes.punchline: Gives terrible advice about objectifying behavior
jokes.explanation: Bender's misogyny showing through his feminine disguise - appropriately awful

jokes.text: Oh, I bet you say that to all the five-Olympic-Gold-Medal-Winning fem-Bots.
jokes.setup: Calculon expressing being impressed
jokes.punchline: Overly specific 'line' acknowledging his unique achievement
jokes.explanation: Good structure playing with 'say that to all the girls' format with specific details

jokes.text: From this day forth, I shall do so whenever possible.
jokes.setup: Responding to accusation of generic compliments
jokes.punchline: Literal commitment to repeat specific compliment format
jokes.explanation: Perfect Calculon literalism - takes joke setup as serious commitment to compliment structure

jokes.text: That's my favorite kind of 'this.'
jokes.setup: Calculon saying 'this may be presumptuous'
jokes.punchline: Bender likes presumptuous advances
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay treating 'presumptuous' as category of approach

jokes.text: Of course I would.
jokes.setup: Bender saying Calculon would fulfill naive farm girl fantasy
jokes.punchline: Calculon matter-of-factly agrees he's that good
jokes.explanation: Perfect Calculon ego - no false modesty about fulfilling fantasies

jokes.text: This top makes me look fat. Is it trampy to go on a first date nude?
jokes.setup: Bender getting ready for date, expressing feminine clothing concerns
jokes.punchline: Escalates to considering complete nudity as solution
jokes.explanation: Logical escalation from fashion anxiety to no-fashion solution

jokes.text: But just once I'd like to eat dinner with a celebrity who isn't bound and gagged.
jokes.setup: Explaining desire for celebrity dinner date
jokes.punchline: Implies history of dining with kidnapped celebrities
jokes.explanation: Dark humor revealing Bender's criminal past while expressing innocent desire

jokes.text: Men love it when you really glob it on.
jokes.setup: Giving makeup advice to other women
jokes.punchline: Terrible advice from male perspective about excessive makeup
jokes.explanation: Shows Bender's male perspective leaking through feminine disguise

jokes.text: I tell you, men are so much better at being women.
jokes.setup: Argument with real women about feminine behavior
jokes.punchline: Makes sexist claim while proving the opposite
jokes.explanation: Ironic statement given Bender's terrible performance as woman

jokes.text: Barry White?
jokes.setup: Discussion about what to do if Calculon wants intimacy
jokes.punchline: Bender's confused reference to Barry White
jokes.explanation: Random pop culture reference showing Bender's confusion about romance

jokes.text: That'll stick a potato in his tailpipe.
jokes.setup: Explaining how asking for commitment will deter Calculon
jokes.punchline: Robot-appropriate version of 'stick a fork in him'
jokes.explanation: Creative robot-specific idiom adaptation - 'potato in tailpipe' for car analogy

jokes.text: She's becoming a slave to her emotions. Just like all women. Particularly you, Leela.
jokes.setup: Professor analyzing Bender's mood swings
jokes.punchline: Makes sweeping sexist generalization then specifically targets Leela
jokes.explanation: Typical Professor tactlessness - general insult made specifically personal

jokes.text: You saved me a trip to the dump. Bam!
jokes.setup: Bender eating large quantities at restaurant
jokes.punchline: Chef compares her to garbage disposal, adds signature 'Bam!'
jokes.explanation: Good Elzar character moment - insults customer with his trademark enthusiasm

jokes.text: I'd appreciate it if you didn't 'bam' the young lady.
jokes.setup: Elzar saying 'bam' after insulting Coilette
jokes.punchline: Calculon treating 'bam' as verb meaning to insult
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay turning Elzar's catchphrase into verb meaning to insult

jokes.text: It's as if you understand the male mind better than I.
jokes.setup: Calculon praising Coilette's understanding
jokes.punchline: Unknowingly accurate - she literally has male mind
jokes.explanation: Perfect dramatic irony - compliment is literally true for wrong reasons

jokes.text: Oh, yes, you have.
jokes.setup: Calculon saying he's never met anyone like Coilette
jokes.punchline: Bender's knowing response that he has (as Bender)
jokes.explanation: Subtle irony - audience knows Calculon has met Bender many times

jokes.text: Whoo! I'm a trophy girlfriend!
jokes.setup: Bender receiving expensive gifts from Calculon
jokes.punchline: Celebrates being objectified as trophy
jokes.explanation: Shows Bender's enjoyment of being pampered despite gender role

jokes.text: And then I can turn back into a guy and hock all this stuff. It's just a game.
jokes.setup: Explaining his romantic strategy
jokes.punchline: Reveals purely mercenary motivation behind relationship
jokes.explanation: Classic Bender - reduces romantic relationship to profit opportunity

jokes.text: Oh, Calculon. Yes, I will!
jokes.setup: Calculon proposing marriage
jokes.punchline: Bender immediately accepts despite just explaining it's a scam
jokes.explanation: Shows Bender staying in character despite audience knowing his real motives

jokes.text: It's sort of a two-person pyramid scheme.
jokes.setup: Explaining marriage plan to divorce and take money
jokes.punchline: Describes marriage as pyramid scheme structure
jokes.explanation: Clever description reframing marriage as business scam structure

jokes.text: That's marriage, all right.
jokes.setup: Bender describing marriage as scam
jokes.punchline: Fry's matter-of-fact agreement with cynical view
jokes.explanation: Simple agreement that reinforces cynical marriage perspective

jokes.text: I, uh. I thought I might like him on a full stomach.
jokes.setup: Accused of dating guy just because hungry
jokes.punchline: Leela's weak defense reveals she's done exactly that
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Leela's pragmatic approach to dating

jokes.text: Zoidy-Poo? Please tell me frilly is in this year.
jokes.setup: Meeting with wedding planner Zoidberg
jokes.punchline: Bender using pet name and asking about frilly decorations
jokes.explanation: Shows Bender's feminine persona extending to wedding planning

jokes.text: Late at night it taunts me with its frosted beauty.
jokes.setup: Discussing frilly cake he's seen
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg's poetic obsession with cake aesthetics
jokes.explanation: Good Zoidberg moment - turns cake appreciation into poetic torment

jokes.text: It's the remote control to my heart. It symbolizes the power you have to sway my emotions.
jokes.setup: Giving Coilette a remote control as gift
jokes.punchline: Overly dramatic romantic symbolism explanation
jokes.explanation: Perfect Calculon melodrama - turns mundane object into romantic metaphor

jokes.text: Will it work on my TV?
jokes.setup: Calculon's poetic gift explanation
jokes.punchline: Bender's practical question about actual functionality
jokes.explanation: Perfect deflation of romantic moment with practical concern - classic Bender

jokes.text: Would we have donkeys? All you could eat.
jokes.setup: Calculon describing peaceful villa life
jokes.punchline: Bender asks about donkeys, Calculon promises unlimited quantity
jokes.explanation: Absurd romantic promise treating donkeys like buffet food - unexpected and funny

jokes.text: Oh, curse this woman's heart!
jokes.setup: Bender feeling genuine emotions about hurting Calculon
jokes.punchline: Blames his mechanical heart for having feelings
jokes.explanation: Good character development - Bender attributing emotions to feminine programming

jokes.text: If there's one kind of pain he can handle... It's soap opera pain.
jokes.setup: Need to hurt Calculon to end the relationship
jokes.punchline: Identifying his professional expertise in dramatic suffering
jokes.explanation: Brilliant insight into Calculon's character - he's trained to handle dramatic tragedy

jokes.text: Who might be looking for someone to play a preacher...
jokes.setup: Wedding preacher beginning ceremony
jokes.punchline: Breaks character to pitch himself to potential casting directors
jokes.explanation: Meta-joke about actors always looking for work, even during ceremonies

jokes.text: Oh, it appears to be a case of African hydraulic fever!
jokes.setup: Medical emergency interrupting wedding
jokes.punchline: Completely made-up disease name
jokes.explanation: Good absurd disease name that sets up soap opera parody

jokes.text: Dear God! The very illness my TV character caught in season two... When I was holding out for more money.
jokes.setup: Doctor diagnosing Coilette with African hydraulic fever
jokes.punchline: Calculon connects to his show's plot and reveals behind-scenes contract dispute
jokes.explanation: Brilliant meta-humor connecting soap opera plot to real actor contract negotiations

jokes.text: When I was holding out for more money.
jokes.setup: Recognizing the disease from his TV show
jokes.punchline: Revealing the real-world reason for the plot device
jokes.explanation: Brilliant meta-humor about TV writing and actor contract negotiations

jokes.text: Deep in the diamond mines of the Congo.
jokes.setup: Questioning how Coilette could catch hydraulic fever
jokes.punchline: Sets up the Congo Jack dramatic entrance
jokes.explanation: Good setup for the melodramatic soap opera twist that follows

jokes.text: You really thought you could steal those diamonds from me and Congo Jack?
jokes.setup: Staged soap opera scene to fake Coilette's death
jokes.punchline: Elzar playing villain with ridiculous motivation
jokes.explanation: Good commitment to melodramatic soap opera tropes by supporting character

jokes.text: Why?
jokes.setup: Tragic soap opera death scene
jokes.punchline: Classic dramatic 'why' delivered with full Calculon intensity
jokes.explanation: Perfect Calculon melodrama - the classic soap opera anguished cry

jokes.text: Yes! And I have a message for you from Col. Matombay. He says, 'This is from Congo Jack.'
jokes.setup: Zoidberg as Congo Jack delivering dramatic message
jokes.punchline: Redundant message that just identifies himself
jokes.explanation: Absurd dramatic message that provides no actual information

jokes.text: N-O-O-O!
jokes.setup: Coilette apparently dying in his arms
jokes.punchline: Calculon's over-the-top dramatic spelling out of 'no'
jokes.explanation: Perfect Calculon melodrama - even spells out his anguish dramatically

jokes.text: And this time, the Academy will not deny me. Not when they see Coilette: The Calculon Story.
jokes.setup: Calculon planning to honor Coilette's memory
jokes.punchline: Film title puts his name first despite being about her
jokes.explanation: Perfect Calculon selfishness - even memorial film is really about him

jokes.text: Every emotion an actor can display.
jokes.setup: Calculon describing his emotional range at funeral
jokes.punchline: Reduces genuine grief to acting technique catalog
jokes.explanation: Shows Calculon viewing even personal tragedy through acting lens

jokes.text: Turn off that crap-O-Rama!
jokes.setup: Professor interrupting Calculon's film
jokes.punchline: Dismisses it as 'crap-o-rama' - suffix making it sound like attraction
jokes.explanation: Good Professor insult with playful suffix making crap sound like entertainment venue

jokes.text: I hope this taught you a lesson about changing your sex to win gold medals.
jokes.setup: Moral lesson about the episode's events
jokes.punchline: Very specific lesson that probably won't apply to others
jokes.explanation: Good meta-humor about overly specific moral lessons in kids' shows

jokes.text: He and I could drive to Vegas, pick up some floozy-Bots... And void their warranties all night long! Whoo!
jokes.setup: Bender reflecting on what he learned about himself
jokes.punchline: Robot version of picking up women and having sex - 'voiding warranties'
jokes.explanation: 'Voiding warranties' as euphemism for robot sex is brilliant wordplay - original and fitting

jokes.text: And his respect for women is back to normal.
jokes.setup: Bender talking about picking up robot women
jokes.punchline: Fry describes his misogyny as 'normal' respect level
jokes.explanation: Dark humor treating Bender's terrible attitude toward women as his baseline normal

jokes.text: Emotions are dumb and should be hated.
jokes.setup: Bender rejecting the emotional movie
jokes.punchline: Contradicts himself by expressing emotional hatred of emotions
jokes.explanation: Perfect logical contradiction - uses emotion (hatred) to reject emotions

jokes.text: Sentimental dribble poop! Come on, Bender, let's go. This chick flick is getting me all barfy.
jokes.setup: Watching Calculon's emotional memorial movie
jokes.punchline: Made-up insult combining 'drivel' and childish terms
jokes.explanation: Good Fry childishness with made-up insult words

jokes.text: I said, 'You two don't dress trampy enough!'
jokes.setup: Calculon asking what Coilette said
jokes.punchline: Bender covers with another inappropriate feminine comment
jokes.explanation: Consistent with Bender's pattern of terrible advice to women
